description_long: This plant pot features a tall, tapered rectangular form with a wide, open top and a narrower base. The exterior is divided into alternating horizontal bands of matte black and dark gray, giving it a modern, minimalist appearance. The sides are flat, with the front and back faces slightly wider than the angled sides, creating a subtle trapezoidal profile. The top edge is sharply defined, and the interior appears hollow, suitable for holding soil and a plant. The surface finish is smooth and hard, likely made from ceramic or concrete. There are no visible decorative motifs or drainage holes on the exterior.
description: A tall, modern plant pot with alternating black and dark gray horizontal bands and a smooth, hard surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide face with two dark horizontal bands and a visible open top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a solid black, slightly angled face with no visible bands or opening.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front, displaying the same banded pattern and open top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, with a solid black, angled face.
attribute_placement_context: commonly used in modern urban plazas or building entrances
